description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single build stage named build. Add a job called build_project that runs on macOS runners tagged xcode-10 and macos. In the job script set formulaName="url-helper-app", set packageName to the CI_PROJECT_NAME variable, set signIdentity first to 'Developer ID Installer: Grigorii Entin (465NA5BW7E)' then to 'Mac Developer', and finally execute ./Pods/GEContinuousIntegration/Scripts/build-gitlab-cmd "$PWD/build" "${packageName:?}" "${formulaName:?}" "${signIdentity:?}" XC_FABRIC_BUILD_SECRET="${XC_FABRIC_BUILD_SECRET:?}". The job should publish the files matching build/*.pkg, build/*.dmg, and build/Formula/*.rb as artifacts. No Docker image or services are required.
